heading.usage: Use for all page titles, metrics numbers, and bold claims. Needs tracking-tight for titles.

body.usage: Use for all standard text, dashboard data, table rows. Provides technical precision.

colors.description: Obsidian black base with pure white for data and Electric Blaze (#E63946) for kinetic triggers.

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1) on all cards. Use 'border-collapse' for grids.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Replace soft shadows with 1px solid strokes or 2px 'inner glow' highlights.
visual_enhancers.textures: Carbon fiber subtle overlays on the sidebar and login backgrounds.

component_rules.cards: Go cardless or use sharp edges (rounded-sm max). Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle border.
component_rules.buttons: Sharp buttons. Use primary red for CTAs only. Add a subtle inner glow on hover.
component_rules.inputs: Shadcn inputs customized with dark backgrounds, white text, red focus rings.
component_rules.tables: Dense, technical feel. Use IBM Plex Sans for tabular data.

grids.layout: High Density Grid (For Dashboards / Analytics). Tight gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized. Override default stretch behavior with align-items: start where needed.
grids.sidebar: Fixed width, dark carbon texture background, red active states.

motion.hover: Hover states must lighten the background (e.g. bg-white/5 to bg-white/10).
motion.transitions: Use specific properties (transition-colors duration-200), NO transition-all.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure white text on dark grey/black background for APCA compliance.

media.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a dense, developer/technical look.
media.3d_libraries: Framer Motion for simple micro-interactions and staggered list reveals. No heavy 3D needed unless for the configurator (optional).

image_urls.description: Red sports car doors open in garage. Perfect dramatic background for the login portal.
Detailed view of carbon fiber texture. Use as a subtle background pattern with low opacity (10-15%).
Black luxury car in studio with sleek design and chrome accents. Good for empty states or configurator banner.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Use .js and .jsx extensions exclusively. Do NOT use .ts or .tsx.
Force dark mode by adding the 'dark' class to the html/body elements in index.html or top-level component.
Override default shadcn styles in index.css to match the CSS variables provided above.
Implement a Language Toggle (German/English) in the header as required by constraints.
Use Phosphor icons. Install with: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react
For the dashboard, use a High Density Grid approach. Make cards stretch to match heights.
Do not use complete transparent backgrounds for the sidebar/header; use solid black or dark grey.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) only where necessary, avoiding muddy grays.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like sharp, technical buttons with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.jsx
